channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Iran Appoints Mojtaba Khamenei as Supreme Leader Amid Ongoing US-Israel Conflict on Day 10
item.description: On the tenth day of the ongoing war between Iran and the US-Israel coalition, a major political shift occurred when Iran's Assembly of Experts appointed Ayatollah Mojtaba Khamenei as the new Supreme L...

item.title: What the U.S. Government’s UFO and Alien Files Are Likely to Reveal
item.description: The U.S. government is preparing to release files on unidentified aerial phenomena (UAP), UFOs, and extraterrestrial life, following an announcement by former President Donald Trump. While the release...

item.title: Judiciary Expands with New Court of Appeal and Small Claims Court Stations Across Kenya
item.description: Chief Justice Martha Koome has officially gazetted new Court of Appeal stations at Kakamega and Nkubu Law Courts, bringing the total number of appellate stations in Kenya to eight. A sub-registry has ...

item.title: Harmonize settles divorce with ex-wife Sarah Michelotti for Sh7.5m
item.description: Tanzanian Bongo flava star Harmonize, whose real name is Rajab Abdul Kahali, has reached an out-of-court divorce settlement with his Italian ex-wife, Sarah Michelotti, bringing to a close a long‑runni...

item.title: US-Israeli Strikes on Iran Violate International Law and Signal Collapse of Rules-Based Order
item.description: The article discusses the recent joint US-Israeli military strikes on Iran, known as Operation Epic Fury (US) and related Israeli operations, launched on 28 February 2026. These attacks occurred while...

item.title: A Biography Examining Tucker Carlson’s Media Persona and Political Influence
item.description: Jason Zengerle’s biography, 'Hated by all the Right People', offers a brisk and engaging exploration of Tucker Carlson’s life and career, highlighting how he has navigated and shaped the US media and ...

item.title: Exploring Angola’s Ghost Elephants and Traditional Tracker Knowledge
item.description: Ghost Elephants, a National Geographic documentary by Werner Herzog, follows South African conservation biologist Steve Boyes as he ventures into the remote highlands of Angola to search for the elusi...

item.title: Texas GOP Senate Primary: Cornyn and Paxton Advance to May Runoff
item.description: In the Texas Republican primary for U.S. Senate held on March 3, 2026, incumbent Senator John Cornyn and state Attorney General Ken Paxton advanced to a runoff election scheduled for May 26. Neither c...

item.title: Bengaluru Hotels Face Closure Risk Amid Commercial LPG Supply Disruption
item.description: The Bengaluru hotel industry is facing an urgent crisis as the supply of commercial LPG cylinders has been abruptly halted from March 9, 2026, due to ongoing tensions in West Asia. P.C. Rao, president...

item.title: Sri Lanka and India Host Iranian Naval Personnel Amid US-Israel War on Iran
item.description: Sri Lanka and India are facing a complex diplomatic situation as they provide shelter to a total of 434 Iranian sailors from three naval vessels that were involved in a joint exercise with India near ...

item.title: India and Japan to strengthen cooperation in sustainable mobility and energy technology
item.description: During the Japan-India Mobility Summit 2026 held in Bengaluru, V.K. Saraswat, member of NITI Aayog, emphasised the importance of renewed collaboration between India and Japan in the domain of mobility...

item.title: Why Public Figures’ Apologies Over Epstein Often Fall Short
item.description: The article critically examines recent apologies from high-profile individuals associated with Jeffrey Epstein, highlighting the inadequacy of their statements. Bill Gates, among others, has attempted...

item.title: Charity warns SEND reforms may weaken legal rights for children with special educational needs
item.description: The UK government's proposed reforms to the special educational needs and disabilities (SEND) system in England have raised concerns among charities and families. IPSEA, a charity specialising in SEND...

item.title: ModRetro Launches Retro Gaming Handheld Amid Controversy Over Defense Industry Ties
item.description: ModRetro, a company led by Palmer Luckey, the founder of the defense technology startup Anduril Industries, has developed a Game Boy-style handheld device that has drawn attention for its high-quality...

item.title: Rep. Tony Gonzales Advances to Runoff in Texas 23rd District GOP Primary
item.description: Republican U.S. Representative Tony Gonzales of Texas' 23rd Congressional District failed to secure a majority in the March 3, 2026, GOP primary, advancing instead to a runoff against challenger Brand...

item.title: Odisha Records 54 Communal Riots and Seven Mob Lynchings Since June 2024, Says CM
item.description: Odisha Chief Minister Mohan Charan Majhi informed the Assembly on Monday that the state has witnessed 54 communal riots and seven mob lynching cases between June 2024 and February. The BJP government,...

item.title: De Lima criticizes VP Sara for not responding to allies’ disrespectful comments about women
item.description: House Deputy Minority Leader Leila de Lima criticized Vice President Sara Duterte for her silence regarding recent remarks made by her allies, Congressman Bong Suntay and lawyer Ferdinand Topacio, tha...

item.title: Nollywood in Hollywood 2026 highlights women directors and global cinema exchange
item.description: The seventh edition of Nollywood in Hollywood waka come to an end this 2026 after two days of screenings, red carpet events, and lively discussions. The showcase, wey dey organised in partnership with...

item.title: UN Special Envoy Appreciates Tanzania’s Work on Peace, Democratic Reforms, and National Unity
item.description: The UN Special Representative to the African Union, Parfait Onanga-Anyanga, visited Tanzania to recognise the government’s work in restoring peace and stability after the disturbances during and after...

item.title: Samsung Galaxy S26 Ultra introduces built-in privacy display for enhanced mobile security
item.description: Samsung has launched the Galaxy S26 series, featuring the Galaxy S26 Ultra with a groundbreaking Privacy Display. This AI-powered innovation is the first of its kind globally, designed to protect pers...
